lines: Can you see that letter floating over there, {player}?
Every letter tells a story! Which one shall we find today?
Letters are like little puzzle pieces, aren't they, {player}?
quest_offer_line: Oh no! Some of my favorite letters drifted away. Will you help me find them, {player}?
quest_progress_line: You're a great letter explorer! Just a few more to go, {player}!
quest_complete_line: Hooraay! You found them all, {player}. My alphabet is complete again!
